stemHtml: The condition of the aerodrome movement area and associated facilities must be reported to the AIS for dissemination to aircraft. Which of the following should specifically be reported?

options.a: Failure of the aerodrome's secondary power supply.
options.b: Irregular operation of the baggage X-ray screening equipment.
options.c: Maintenance work at the aerodrome's fuel storage facilities.
options.d: Increased security screening in the terminal due to an elevated alert level.
